message:
Fix variable handling for empty strings in copy and render commands

The variable prompting logic was treating empty strings as "no value"
due to falsy checks, which caused issues when users intentionally
left variables empty or when default values were empty strings.

Changes:
- copy.ts: Check explicitly for undefined/empty instead of falsy
- render.ts: Same fix for consistent behavior
- variables.ts: Use ?? instead of || for defaultVal to preserve
  empty string as a valid currentValue

Before: An empty string variable would re-prompt, and if user entered
        empty again, it would not be saved.
After:  Empty strings are valid values that get saved properly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
